_comment: BUSINESS DATA DICTIONARY (BDD). This file maps exact AEP XDM JSON paths to plain-English business descriptions. The LLM relies on this file via the discover_xdm_schema tool to learn the enterprise's custom schemas.

schemas.business_description: Standard first name of the customer. Use this for general demographic inquiries.
Standard last name of the customer.
The primary email address on file for the user.
The custom enterprise loyalty tier. Active source of truth for rewards. Values can be ['Silver', 'Gold', 'Platinum'].
DO NOT USE. Legacy standard AEP field. We use _customTenant.loyalty.tier instead.
A predictive score between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating likelihood of churning in the next 30 days. Scores > 0.8 are high risk.
